Aloe caelestis, also known as the 'Tree Aloe', is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. The health benefits of Aloe caelestis include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Aloe caelestis include glycosides, flavonoids, and anthraquinones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Aloe caelestis include topical creams and ointments for skin conditions, as well as oral supplements for digestive health and immune system support.
